name: The Bogey Room | Private Golf Simulator Lounge
address: 121 S Sullivan Rd, Spokane Valley, WA 99037
about: The Bogey Room is a private, member-only indoor golf lounge operating across three locations in the Pacific Northwest. It provides exclusive access to state-of-the-art golf simulators with a focus on community, convenience, and game improvement. Membership is required for access, with pricing varying per location and based on an initiation fee plus a monthly membership cost, offering unlimited access and no contracts. The venue is designed as a private lounge environment where members can bring their own food and drink, with on-site refrigerators available, and features a mix of social and competitive golf activities.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 key card access to the facility with mobile booking and scheduling
State-of-the-art Uneekor launch monitors providing industry-leading accuracy and realism
Access to 100+ top golf courses from around the world and real-time swing analytics
A family-friendly environment with bi-monthly leagues, member tournaments, and virtual challenges

food_and_drink.notes: Members can bring their own food; fridges are available on-site to store food during bookings. Eating and drinking are not permitted on the turf.
Members can bring their own alcoholic drinks; fridges are available on-site to store drinks during bookings. Drinking is not permitted on the turf.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitors cited as being less than 1% off in accuracy and providing exceptional realism.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify if rental clubs are available. It is recommended that members bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, members can bring their own food and drink. The venue provides fridges for storage during bookings. However, eating and drinking on the turf is not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play 18 holes. Booking policy allows for up to 2 hours at a time.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Bogey Room is described as a family-friendly environment where members can bring guests.
